# Roadmap: Error thresholds in holographic codes

## Overview

This roadmap treats threshold comparison as a research problem rather than a loose literature summary. The project first builds a primary-source baseline, then normalizes decoder and code-rate differences, then isolates the most defensible unresolved frontier, and finally verifies that the comparison discipline holds before the report is closed.

## Contract Overview

| Contract Item | Advanced By Phase(s) | Status |
| ------------- | -------------------- | ------ |
| Primary-source threshold map | Phase 1, Phase 2, Phase 4 | Planned |
| Decoder/channel normalization | Phase 2, Phase 4 | Planned |
| Frontier gap identification | Phase 3, Phase 4 | Planned |
| Follow-on roadmap | Phase 3 | Planned |

## Phases

- [ ] **Phase 1: Literature threshold baseline** - Build the threshold table and source taxonomy.
- [ ] **Phase 2: Decoder and rate normalization** - Separate code effects from decoder and channel effects.
- [ ] **Phase 3: Frontier gap and study design** - Identify the strongest unresolved threshold question and shape the next study.
- [ ] **Phase 4: Verification and synthesis** - Stress-test the comparison, resolve caveats, and finalize the narrative.
